title: What We Do
subtitle: Six disciplines. One mission: make you harder to compromise.

items.title: Offensive Security & VAPT
items.desc: Elite-level penetration testing across web, mobile, and thick-client applications. We simulate real-world TTPs to identify critical logic flaws before exploitation.

items.title: Detection, Response & Forensics
items.desc: 24/7 SOC monitoring paired with legal-grade digital forensics. We hunt, neutralize threats in real-time, and perform deep-dive post-breach investigations.

items.title: Cloud & Infrastructure Hardening
items.desc: Architecting Zero Trust environments and securing hybrid-cloud workloads. We harden your perimeter, internal switching, and virtualized assets.

items.title: Certify: ISO & Industry Standards
items.desc: Leading you through the rigorous journey to ISO 27001 and PCI DSS certification. Our experts act as your internal audit powerhouse for NRB and SWIFT compliance.

items.title: vISO: Strategic Leadership
items.desc: Executive-level security governance without the overhead. We provide the roadmap, budget guidance, and board-level reporting you need to lead securely.

items.title: Uplift: Security Culture
items.desc: Beyond simple training. We build a 'human firewall' through phishing simulations and advanced technical capacity building for your IT teams.
